positive: A sophisticated, symmetrical pattern design featuring stylized celestial elements (crescent moons, detailed constellations, cosmic dust swirls) interwoven with lush, stylized botanical motifs like large fern fronds, tropical palms, and lily pads. The artwork must rely heavily on strong, clean, thick black silhouettes for maximum contrast, designed to pop against a single background color. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern negative space illustration. Limited, rich color palette: deep indigo, metallic gold accents, and jade green ink wash. The composition must be central, harmonious, and perfectly suitable for seamless repeat printing on apparel. High contrast, vector quality, etched look, perfect print art.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, noise, low detail, sloppy, imperfect, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, muddy, photographic, 3D render
